ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2003 Continued To Nov-05-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

To Vacate Order Re: Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Order re: Sanctions issued on 7/9/2003 to Anthony L. Head, Esq., in the amount of $250.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
